heading: Authority of Secretary to make grants
label: 10901 Authority of Secretary to make grants
text: The Secretary is authorized to make a grant for any fiscal year to any State receiving a grant under title XX of the Social Security Act [ et seq.] for such fiscal year to enable such State to award scholarships to eligible individuals within the State who are candidates for the Child Development Associate credential.42 U.S.C. 1397
notes: References in TextThe Social Security Act, referred to in text, is , . Title XX of the Social Security Act is classified principally to subchapter XX (§ 1397 et seq.) of chapter 7 of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Aug. 14, 1935, ch. 53149 Stat. 620section 1305 of this title
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1986 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 1986section 1001 of Pub. L. 99–425section 8621 of this title

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 99–425, title VI, § 601100 Stat. 976Sept. 30, 1986“This title [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Child Development Associate Scholarship Assistance Act of 1985’.”
